name: Apprentice Engineer
text: Reaction: After this character enters play, choose a holding in your dynasty discard pile – Put that holding into play in one of your unbroken non-stronghold provinces, discarding each other card in that province.

name: Assassination
text: Conflict Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower – discard that character. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: Steel whispered through silk and flesh. In the morning, they would find the body and speak of shadows and dishonor — but tonight, the deed was done.

name: Borderlands Defender
text: While this character is defending, opponents' card effects cannot bow it or move it.

versions.flavor: Even when faced with such hardship, the Crab Clan has never wavered, standing steadfast in its duty to protect the southern border of the Empire.
Where the Empire's edge meets wild lands, where civilization faces chaos, the Crab plant themselves like mountains: immovable, eternal.

name: Defend the Wall
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict at this province – resolve the ring effect of that conflict as if you were the attacking player.

name: Fertile Fields
text: Conflict Action: Draw 1 card.

versions.flavor: "Inari-no-Kami smiles upon these lands." - Aiko, priestess of Inari
“The fortunes blessed these lands, but it takes honest work to harvest them.”

name: Fine Katana
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor:
Immortal steel waits
Venerated divine blade
The fires of the soul

“Just as a horse must have endurance and no defects, so it is with weapons. Horses should walk strongly, and swords and companion swords should cut strongly.”
— Miyamoto Musashi

name: Flooded Waste
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – bow each attacking character.

versions.flavor: Where none survive to cremate the fallen, rot and corruption reign.

name: Frontline Engineer
text: This character gets +1 glory for each holding in play. Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending - search the top 5 cards of your dynasty deck for a holding and put it into play in the attacked province, discarding each other card in that province. Shuffle.

name: Fruitful Respite
text: Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict, if he or she controls 1 or more ready characters - gain 2 fate.

versions.flavor: Kaiu engineers are never idle.

name: Give No Ground
text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a defending character you control - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +2[conflict-military] and cannot have its skills reduced. (This includes by attachments, lasting effects, and status tokens.)

name: Guardians of Rokugan
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - search the top X cards of your dynasty deck for a character with printed cost X or lower and put it into play, where X is the amount of skill by which you won.

name: Hida Kotoe
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as the defender, choose an attachment - discard it.

versions.flavor: "You don't need this."

name: Hida O-Ushi
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - you may declare an additional [conflict-military] conflict this phase. (Max 1 per phase.)

versions.flavor: "Empty words are the coward's way."

name: Hida Sukune
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending - draw 1 card and discard 1 card from your hand. (Limit once per conflict.)

versions.flavor: "Few can claim to know the defences of the Wall as well as the Champion's youngest son. Yet who will follow such a child into battle?" - Hida Sanae

name: Hida Tomonatsu
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender, sacrifice it. Choose a non-unique attacking character – return that character to the top of its owner's deck.

name: Hiruma Ambusher
text: Reaction: After this character enters play as a defender, choose a character – that character's abilities cannot be triggered during this conflict.

name: Hiruma Signaller
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, sacrifice this character and choose a character you control - ready that character and move it to the conflict.

name: Hiruma Yōjimbō
text: This character cannot be declared as an attacker.

versions.flavor: Enemies learned quickly: it was never wise to give her reason to draw that awful blade.

name: Inventive Buttressing
text:
Attach to an unbroken province you control.
Attached province gets +3 strength during [conflict-military] conflicts.

versions.flavor: "It would take several oni to break these gates." - Kaiu Shuichi

name: Kaiu Forges
text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: Choose a province you control - search the top 10 cards of your dynasty deck for a holding and switch it with a Kaiu Wall holding in that province. Shuffle. (The new holding is faceup.)

name: Kaiu Shihobu
text: Reaction: After this character enters play - search your dynasty deck for any number of holdings, reveal them, and put them facedown underneath your stronghold province (out of play). Shuffle. Action: Put a facedown holding under your stronghold province into play in an unbroken non-stronghold province you control, discarding each other card in that province. Errata from the Imperial Law (2020-01-06)

name: Kaiu Shuichi
text: Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.) Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, if there is a holding in play – gain 1 fate.

name: Kaiu Siege Force
text: No attachments. Action: Put a (friendly) holding on the bottom of your dynasty deck - ready this character.

versions.flavor: Where the work of Kaiu minds falls short, Kaiu hands must follow through.

name: Kuni Ritsuko
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender, choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

versions.flavor: "The kami of earth abhor corruption even more than we do. Their aid is ours for the asking."

name: Kyūden Hida
text: Action: During the dynasty phase, bow this stronghold - look at the top 3 cards of your dynasty deck. You may play a character from among those cards as if it were in your provinces. Discard the rest.

name: Levy
text: Action: Choose an opponent, that player must select one – give you 1 fate or 1 honor.

versions.flavor: "Every clan must aid in the defense of Rokugan."

name: Meditations on the Tao
text: Conflict Action: Choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

versions.flavor: "Appreciation of beauty is the beginning of wisdom." - Tao of Shinsei

"The motion of the Tao is the return
The way of the Tao is yielding
All things under the Sky come from existence
All that exists comes out of Nothing"
— Laozi

name: Midnight Builder
text: Dire - you may trigger the ability on each holding you control an additional time each round (or specified period). (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.) Each holding you control gets +2 bonus strength.

name: Northern Curtain Wall
text: Limit 1 per deck. Each Kaiu Wall holding in each adjacent province gets +2 bonus strength.

name: Ornate Fan
text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor: At times, the ornamentation is the point. At others, it is merely a distraction.

“There is another kind of artist, who sets more soberly about his work, striving to give real beauty to the things which men actually use and to give to them the shape which tradition has ordained.” 
— Murasaki Shikibu

name: Pit Trap
text: Attach to a character. Play only on an attacking character. Attached character does not ready during the regroup phase. Errata from RRG v1.2

versions.flavor: "My apologies, samurai-san. That pit was intended for goblins." – Kaiu Shuichi

name: Purifier Apprentice
text: Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player - your opponent loses 1 honor.

versions.flavor: "When you face the darkness of the Shadowlands, you must be unflinching, lest you become the subject you wish to study." - Kuni Ritsuko

name: Raise the Alarm
text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which you are the defending player – turn a dynasty card in the attacked province faceup. Then, if that card is a character, put it into play as a defender.

name: Rebuild
text: Action: Shuffle a card in one of your unbroken provinces back into your dynasty deck. Choose a holding in your dynasty discard pile – put that holding into play in that province.

name: River of the Last Stand
text: Limit 1 per deck. Action: During a conflict at a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding - your opponent discards 2 random cards from his or her hand and draws 1 card.

name: Seeker of Air
text: You may replace 1 province of any element with an additional [element-air] province while deckbuilding. Reaction: After an [element-air] province you control is revealed – gain 1 fate.

name: Seventh Tower
text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player, if the attacked province has a Kaiu Wall holding - Resolve the ring effect of the contested ring as if you were the attacking player.

name: Shameful Display
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose 2 participating characters – honor one of those characters and dishonor the other.

name: Siege Warfare
text: Action: During a conflict in which you are attacking, if you control a holding – until the end of the conflict, the attacked province gets -2 strength (to a minimum of 0).

name: Staunch Hida
text: Reaction: After this character wins a conflict as a defender – resolve the ring effect of that conflict as if you were the attacking player. (Max 1 per conflict)

name: Subterranean Guile
text: During [conflict-military] conflicts, if you control a holding on an unbroken province, attached character gains covert.

versions.flavor: "You'll get used to the smell" - Yasuki Fuzake

name: The Mountain Does Not Fall
text: Action: Choose a character - for this phase, that character does not bow as a result of conflict resolution while defending. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: They say the wise bend like bamboo before the storm. The Crab are the mountain that breaks the storm itself.

name: The Strength of the Mountain
text: Action: During a conflict - until the end of the conflict, each defending character cannot be bowed or moved home by opponents' card effects and does not bow as the result of conflict resolution.

name: Third Whisker Warrens
text: Limit 1 per deck. During each conflict at a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding, you may look at and play the top card of your dynasty deck as if it were in your hand.

name: Unyielding Sensei
text: Action: Choose an unbroken province you control with a holding - look at the top 2 cards of your dynasty deck. You may put a character card from among them into the province faceup. (Do not discard the other cards in the province.)

name: Watch Commander
text: Attach to a character you control. Limit 1 per character. Reaction: After an opponent plays a card during a conflict in which attached character is participating – that player loses 1 honor. (Unlimited.)

name: Watchtower of Sun's Shadow
text: Limit 1 per deck. Each character attacking a province you control with a Kaiu Wall holding gets -1[conflict-military] and -1[conflict-political] for each fate on that character. Forced Interrupt: When this holding's province is broken - you lose 2 fate.

name: Watchtower of Valor
text: Limit 1 per deck. Reaction: After you win a conflict as the defending player, if the attacked province has a Kaiu Wall holding - draw 1 card. (Unlimited.)

name: Withstand the Darkness
text: Reaction: After an opponent plays an event that chooses a [clan-crab] character you control as a target - place 1 fate on that character. (Max 1 per phase.)

name: Yasuki Hikaru
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, choose an attacking character with higher [conflict-military] skill than this character - move the chosen character home.

versions.flavor: "As a samurai in service to my clan, I cannot allow you to spread the Taint any further."

name: Yasuki Oguri
text: Covert. Reaction: After an opponent plays an event during a conflict in which this character is defending – until the end of the conflict, this character gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political]. (Unlimited.)

name: Hida Kisada
text: While you have not lost a conflict this phase, cancel the effects of the first action ability your opponent triggers from a card during each conflict.

versions.flavor: "What need have I of glory to defend this Wall?"
